overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a player walking through a dense foggy forest at night toward a distant campfire. The player approaches a campsite with a tent and discovers a survivor sitting by the fire, creating a tense atmospheric scene.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the foggy forest toward a distant orange glow

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining the left side of the forest path
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with scattered leaves
faint orange light visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dense, foggy forest at night, following a narrow dirt trail. Tall pine trees flank both sides while a mysterious orange glow from a distant campfire pierces through the mist ahead.

events.description: canvas tent becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the campfire and a tent come into clearer view through the fog

entered.detail: weathered canvas tent pitched among the trees

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches, a canvas tent becomes visible on the right side of the trail. The campfire grows brighter and more defined, illuminating the immediate area with a warm orange glow against the dark forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with active fire and seated survivor

events.description: survivor character becomes visible sitting by the campfire

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the campfire and the seated survivor

notable_agents.action: survivor sitting by the campfire, appears to be resting or warming themselves

entered.detail: wooden crate or stool placed near the fire

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at the campsite where a survivor sits by the roaring campfire. The tent is now visible in the background while the fire illuminates the immediate clearing, revealing a wooden crate near the flames.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, oppressive forest that gradually opens into a warm, illuminated campsite. It begins on a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees, where a mysterious orange glow pierces through the dense night fog. As the camera advances, the mist thins to reveal a canvas tent on the right while the distant campfire grows brighter and more defined. The scene then shifts into a clear opening as the player arrives at the campsite, where the roaring flames fully illuminate a wooden crate and a survivor sitting by the fire.
